pieces.center: Cracked cobblestone, main walking surface with fine cracks, dust in gaps
pieces.top: Cobblestone edge meeting void/grass, top border eroded
pieces.bottom: Bottom border, partial rubble spill into lower terrain
pieces.left: Left edge, broken stones with exposed mortar
pieces.right: Right edge, partial collapse showing dirt underneath

sd.prompt: (masterpiece:1.3), (best quality:1.2), 2D pixel art tileset, top-down RPG tile, cracked cobblestone road, dark ruins city, mist grey (#2D2D3F) base with broken purple (#5C4A72) mortar, fine crack patterns, dust in gaps, dark fantasy abandoned city aesthetic, seamless edges, (2px black outline:1.3), (no anti-aliasing:1.2), (clean pixel edges:1.4), 32x32 tile, 3-step cel shading, top-left 45-degree lighting, {piece_description}, <lora:pixel-art-style-v2:0.7>, <lora:custom-aeterna-v1:0.8>, aeterna_style
sd.negative: 3D render, realistic photo, blurry, watermark, text, logo, low quality, noisy, JPEG artifacts, perspective view, isometric, character, modern

dalle.prompt: Top-down 2D pixel art RPG tileset piece, 32x32 pixels, cracked cobblestone road tile for a dark ruined city. Color palette: mist grey (#2D2D3F) and broken purple (#5C4A72) mortar, with faint cyan (#89CFF0) memory glow in deepest cracks. {piece_description}. Clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, 2px black outline, 3-step cel shading with top-left lighting. Seamless tile edges. Dark fantasy Korean MMORPG tilemap style.

midjourney.prompt: top-down 2D pixel art RPG tile, cracked cobblestone road, dark ruined city tileset, mist grey and broken purple palette, faint cyan memory glow in cracks, {piece_description}, 32x32 pixel tile, clean pixel edges, black outline, cel shading, seamless, dark fantasy MMORPG --ar 1:1 --s 250 --niji 6

generation_notes.autotile_workflow: Generate center tile first → derive edges/corners via inpainting with seamless constraint
generation_notes.variant_generation: Use same seed range with slight prompt variation (crack pattern A/B/C)
generation_notes.post_process: remove_bg → color_correct to palette → qa_runner tile-seamless check
